---
title: "Boruta escenari nul"
author: "Max Ranz de la Iglesia"
date: "2026-04-08"
output: html_document
--- 


# Boruta 50%
```{r}
# Boruta 50
setwd("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos")
load("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos/dades_escenari_50_corrAleat.RData")

library(Boruta)
library(caret)

# Data frame on es guardaran les mètriques agregades per escenari
resultats_boruta <- data.frame(
  N             = integer(),
  pi            = numeric(),
  correlation   = character(),  
  Sensibilitat  = numeric(),
  Especificitat = numeric(),
  VPP           = numeric(),
  VPN           = numeric(),
  Accuracy      = numeric(),
  NetBenefit    = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

vars_seleccionades_boruta <- list()

# es recorren totes les combinacions d’escenaris simulats
system.time({
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(comb))) {

    N           <- comb$N[i]
    pi          <- comb$pi[i]
    correlation <- as.character(comb$correlation[i])  # <- forcem character

    metrics        <- list()
    vars_selec_bin <- matrix(0, nrow = iters, ncol = num_vars)

    for (j in 1:iters) {
      cat("Escenari", i, "- Simulació", j,
          "(N=", N, "pi=", pi, "corr=", correlation, ")\n")

      X_df  <- as.data.frame(X[[i]][[j]])
      y_fac <- as.factor(Y[[i]][[j]])
# es preparen les dades en format compatible amb Boruta
      df_boruta <- data.frame(y = y_fac, X_df)

      tryCatch({
        model_boruta <- suppressWarnings(
          Boruta(y ~ ., data = df_boruta, doTrace = 0)
        )
# recollim només les variables confirmades (sense les tentatives)
        seleccionades <- getSelectedAttributes(model_boruta, withTentative = FALSE)

        if (length(seleccionades) > 0) {
          idx_sel <- as.numeric(gsub("[^0-9]", "", seleccionades))
          idx_sel <- idx_sel[!is.na(idx_sel) & idx_sel >= 1 & idx_sel <= num_vars]
          vars_selec_bin[j, idx_sel] <- 1
          metrics[[j]] <- metriques(idx_sel, nv = num_vars)
        } else {
          metrics[[j]] <- metriques(integer(0), nv = num_vars)
        }

      }, error = function(e) {
        cat(sprintf("  [WARN] Escenari %d, sim %d: %s\n", i, j, conditionMessage(e)))
        metrics[[j]] <<- metriques(integer(0), nv = num_vars)
      })
    }

    resultats_boruta <- rbind(
      resultats_boruta,
      data.frame(
        N             = N,
        pi            = pi,
        correlation   = correlation,  # <- character "0","0.1","0.3","random"
        Sensibilitat  = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["sensibilitat"]),  na.rm = TRUE),
        Especificitat = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["especificitat"]), na.rm = TRUE),
        VPP           = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["VPP"]),           na.rm = TRUE),
        VPN           = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["VPN"]),           na.rm = TRUE),
        Accuracy      = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["accuracy"]),      na.rm = TRUE),
        NetBenefit    = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["net_benefit"]),   na.rm = TRUE),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    )

    vars_seleccionades_boruta[[i]] <- vars_selec_bin
  }
})

print(resultats_boruta)
save(resultats_boruta, vars_seleccionades_boruta,
     file = "resultats_boruta_50_correlacio.RData")
```
